scenarios.name: Unit test: health handler returns correct response
scenarios.description: The health handler unit test verifies that GET /healthz returns HTTP 200 with body {"status":"ok"} and correct Content-Type header using httptest.

scenarios.name: Unit test: echo handler with valid input
scenarios.description: The echo handler unit test verifies that POST /api/echo with valid JSON returns correct echo and length using httptest.

scenarios.name: Unit test: echo handler with missing message field
scenarios.description: The echo handler unit test verifies that POST /api/echo with a JSON body missing the message field returns HTTP 400 with {"error":"invalid input"} using httptest.

scenarios.name: Unit test: echo handler with malformed JSON
scenarios.description: The echo handler unit test verifies that POST /api/echo with an invalid JSON body returns HTTP 400 with {"error":"invalid input"} using httptest.

scenarios.name: Unit test: echo handler with message exceeding maximum length
scenarios.description: The echo handler unit test verifies that POST /api/echo with a message exceeding 10,000 bytes returns HTTP 400 with {"error":"message too long"} using httptest.

scenarios.name: Unit test: echo handler with non-string message value
scenarios.description: The echo handler unit test verifies that POST /api/echo with a message value that is not a string type returns HTTP 400 with {"error":"invalid input"} using httptest.

scenarios.name: Unit test: healthz rejects non-GET methods
scenarios.description: The handler unit test verifies that POST /healthz returns HTTP 405 Method Not Allowed using httptest.

scenarios.name: Unit test: echo rejects non-POST methods
scenarios.description: The echo handler unit test verifies that GET /api/echo returns HTTP 405 Method Not Allowed using httptest.

scenarios.name: Unit test: not found handler returns 404
scenarios.description: The router unit test verifies that the router's RegisterNotFound method correctly returns HTTP 404 with {"error":"not found"} and correct Content-Type for unregistered paths using httptest.

scenarios.name: Unit test: router registers all routes
scenarios.description: The router unit test verifies that all routes (healthz, echo, not-found) are registered on the ServeMux correctly using httptest.
